articles.title: Rubio says 'solid' Iran deal may come on Monday
articles.description: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, US media reports.

articles.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

articles.title: How Saudi Arabia's spending spree reached the end of the line
articles.description: MBS's Vison 2030 project seemed the stuff of science fiction. Now reality has bitten

articles.title: RAF jet carrying defence secretary has signal jammed near Russian border
articles.description: Pilots on board had to use a different navigation system while the plane's GPS was disabled.
